overall.description: First-person gameplay footage in a medieval fantasy setting at night. The player approaches and enters a rustic wooden barn with thatched roofing, revealing a horse in a stall and a child NPC inside, illuminated by warm lantern light.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village courtyard with thatched-roof barn

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the large wooden barn entrance in the village courtyard at night

entered.detail: large wooden barn with steep thatched roof and wide entrance
vertical wooden planks forming the exterior wall of the structure
unpaved dirt ground surface of the village courtyard
simple wooden fence running along the right side of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a medieval barn at night in a rural village setting. The scene is dimly lit by moonlight, showing the thatched roof and wooden construction of the barn ahead, with dirt ground underfoot.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval barn interior with horse stalls and hay storage

events.description: player enters the wooden barn from the outside courtyard, transitioning from moonlight to warm lantern light
player's hand reaches out and touches the wooden post of the horse stall
player turns toward the barn exit following the child NPC

agents.ego_description: exploring the barn interior, interacting with the environment by touching a wooden post and observing the horse and child near the exit

notable_agents.action: dark horse standing in the stall, occasionally moving its head and shifting position
child in simple brown clothing standing near the far exit, looking toward the outside

entered.detail: wooden wagon with large wheels parked inside the barn
lit lantern providing warm yellow illumination on the cart
thick vertical and horizontal wooden beams supporting the roof structure
stacked hay bales stored along the right wall
stone base visible at the bottom of the wooden walls
wooden trough in the horse stall for feed and water

segments.scene_description: Inside the barn, warm lantern light reveals a horse in a stall to the left and a child near the far exit. The player touches a wooden post while exploring the rustic interior with its dirt floor, hay bales, and wooden support beams, then moves toward the exit following the child.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a moonlit rural exterior into the warm, sheltered interior of a medieval barn. It begins with a slow approach across the dirt ground toward the wooden structure, where the thatched roof is dimly illuminated by the night sky. As the camera crosses the threshold, the cool moonlight gives way to the golden glow of lantern light, revealing a rustic interior filled with hay bales and wooden support beams. The perspective then glides past a horse in a stall and brushes against a wooden post before shifting toward the far exit to follow a child.
